stonetop.summary: Antlered wooden sentinels that roost disguised as boughs, guarding old Green Lord sites.

system.concept: Antlered wooden sentinels that roost disguised as boughs, guarding old Green Lord sites.
system.description: Hunched humanoid forms carved of wood, with great wings, taloned feet, and heads crowned with branch-like antlers. They were made by the Green Lords to be sentinels and guardians, to watch over their borders and their most important sites. Now, ages and generations later, they still watch, and wait, and protect their nests.

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** The tales say that the song of a red-breasted bluebird will keep the rhagedn still, letting folk pass unmolested.
**Something useful:** It just so happens that you know how to whistle the tune (whether or not you can whistle it well enough is questionable).
